name: Tony Destro
title: Principal Software Engineer / Agentic AI Engineering
summary: Principal software engineer with 20+ years across agentic AI engineering, technical leadership, full-stack product platforms, data-intensive systems, cloud delivery, ecommerce, mobile, embedded integrations, distributed delivery teams, and interactive web experiences.
positioning: I design and build software where the hard parts meet: bounded AI workflows, cloud architecture, product constraints, data-heavy systems, and distributed teams. The work is practical, reviewable, and built to survive past the first release.
capabilities: Agentic AI engineering and bounded automation
AI-assisted review, analysis, and developer workflows
Distributed delivery with Mexican and Ukrainian/Eastern Europe-based teams
Nearshore, offshore, and partner engineering coordination

focus_areas.label: Agentic AI
focus_areas.title: Bounded AI workflows for engineering work.
focus_areas.summary: LLM reasoning connected to source context, schema discovery, retrieval, SQL validation, and explicit execution limits.

focus_areas.label: Distributed teams
focus_areas.title: Delivery across US, Mexican, and Ukrainian/Eastern Europe teams.
focus_areas.summary: Hands-on technical leadership across internal engineers, Mexican collaborators, Ukrainian/Eastern Europe delivery partners, review, architecture, and agile execution.

focus_areas.label: Production systems
focus_areas.title: AI, cloud, product, and data work shipped together.
focus_areas.summary: FastAPI, .NET, React, Azure, SQL, CI/CD, identity, search, and operational tooling brought into one delivery path.

ai_history.label: AI timeline
ai_history.title: Practical AI workflow work was already in motion in 2023.
ai_history.summary: Private Python prototypes from September-November 2023 connected GPT-3.5 with browser automation, OAuth-backed email APIs, local workflow state, and PostgreSQL records.

distributed_delivery.label: Destro Machines
distributed_delivery.title: Mexican engineering collaboration
distributed_delivery.summary: Co-owned and led software delivery with Mexican engineering collaborators across SwimView, pool-deck data visualization, BLE/mobile integration, cloud services, and commerce/fulfillment systems.

distributed_delivery.label: ISACA
distributed_delivery.title: Ukrainian and Eastern Europe delivery
distributed_delivery.summary: Principal engineer and technical lead coordinating internal engineers with Ukrainian/Eastern Europe delivery partners across MAGI, CMMI systems, Kentico/Xperience, .NET/React delivery, Azure infrastructure, review, and agile execution.

details: Completed most Computer Science B.A. coursework; remaining requirements were a few math credits.
Phi Kappa Theta, Pennsylvania Alpha Xi, Founder and Vice-President.

volunteering.summary: Built and maintained the school website with HTML and PHP.
Won the World Famous Orientation Website Award twice from the National Orientation Director's Association.
